prompt: An alien marketplace on a distant planet. Vendor stalls display exotic alien fruits and artifacts under holographic signs in unknown script. Glowing stones are embedded in the dusty alien ground. A tall glowing blue crystal fountain stands on the right side. Towering organic alien architecture rises in the background against a purple sky with two visible moons. Bioluminescent colors throughout. To the left, a narrow alley between coral-like alien structures leads to a docking pad where a small hovering cargo pod is being unloaded by insectoid alien workers. Behind the viewer, a large archway of interlocking bone-white ribs marks the marketplace entrance, flanked by pulsing amber lantern pods. Further ahead, a raised platform with a holographic auctioneer projects rotating 3D images of rare off-world relics. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level looking down the marketplace lane past the vendor stalls and crystal fountain. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: glowing blue crystal fountain on the right

scene_adherence.visible_part: An alien marketplace is on a distant planet. Vendor stalls display exotic alien fruits and artifacts under holographic signs in unknown script. Glowing stones are embedded in the dusty alien ground. A tall glowing blue crystal fountain stands on the right side. Towering organic alien architecture rises in the background against a purple sky with two visible moons. Bioluminescent colors are present throughout the scene.

Behind the viewer, a large archway of interlocking bone-white ribs marks the marketplace entrance, flanked by pulsing amber lantern pods. Further ahead, a raised platform with a holographic auctioneer projects rotating 3D images of rare off-world relics.
